[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 2/5 (Wed), Scrimmage reward will be tripled!
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop exclusive Weapons!

🗓️Period: 2/5 (Wed) 7:00 PM – 2/12 (Wed) 6:59 PM (UTC)
